mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_permission (name, code, type, path, parent_id, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.name}, #{item.code}, #{item.type}, #{item.path}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO sys_permission (name, code, type, path, parent_id, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.name}, #{item.code}, #{item.type}, #{item.path}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), code = VALUES(code), type = VALUES(type), path = VALUES(path), parent_id = VALUES(parent_id), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
